summary: Pet OS Navigation and MOJO Modal testing completed. Fixed critical bug in MojoProfileModal.jsx that caused 'Cannot read properties of null (scrollIntoView)' error. All 11 MOJO sections and multi-pet switching now working correctly.

pet_os_navigation.details: 7-layer navigation bar working with tabs: MOJO, TODAY, PICKS, SERVICES, INSIGHTS, LEARN, CONCIERGE®

pet_avatar_ring.details: Pet avatar displays correctly with concentric rings and soul score badge (34% for Lola)

mojo_modal.details: Modal opens correctly after fix. Shows real pet data.
mojo_modal.bug_fixed: scrollIntoView called on null ref inside setTimeout - moved null check inside timeout callback

pet_snapshot.details: Shows pet name (Lola), breed (Maltese), soul score (34%)

soul_profile.details: 44% complete, shows Temperament: Friendly, Energy: High energy, With People: Excited

multi_pet_switching.details: 7 pets available, successfully switched from Lola to Mystique, UI updated correctly

section_completion_percentages.details: Each section shows calculated completion percentage from real API data

ui_bugs.fix_applied: Moved null check inside setTimeout callback at line 929-936

critical_code_review_comments: MojoProfileModal.jsx line 929: Fixed - scrollIntoView null ref check was outside setTimeout but needed to be inside
All 11 MOJO sections render correctly with real data from /api/pets/{pet_id}, /api/mira/personalization-stats/{pet_id}, and /api/member/profile endpoints
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with 7 pets
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pet OS Navigation and MOJO modal fully working. Bug fix applied to MojoProfileModal.jsx for scrollIntoView null reference. All 11 MOJO sections render with real data. Multi-pet switching works correctly with 7 pets available.

bug_fix_details.root_cause: Ref check was done before setTimeout but ref could become null during the 300ms delay
